# Kobin — Agency Operating System
# https://www.kobin.team


## Socials
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kobin.ai/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/kobin-app/
- Product Hunt: https://www.producthunt.com/products/kobin


## About
Kobin is an all-in-one agency operating system that replaces Slack, Notion, HubSpot, Linear, and Buffer in a single workspace. Built for agency founders and small teams managing clients, projects, and operations. Currently in closed beta with active agency customers.

## What Kobin replaces
- Slack → Real-time inbox with project rooms, group chats, and DMs. File attachments, replies, forwards, @AI mentions, unread badges.
- Notion + Google Drive → Vault (Google Drive-backed file management, role-scoped by folder: Internal Documents, Client Uploads, Deliverables)
- HubSpot → Built-in CRM for leads, investors, partners, advisors, and talent. Meeting outcome logging, follow-up reminders, contact tagging.
- Linear / Asana → Time-horizon task system (Today, This Week, Delegated, Backlog). Priority sorting, team assignment, deliverable requirements, analytics.
- Buffer / Taplio → LinkedIn Studio for drafting, scheduling, and tracking posts with impressions and engagement metrics.
- Calendly + Google Calendar → Calendar with Google Meet auto-generation, two-stage meeting reminders, pre-meeting AI briefs.

## Pricing (as of 2026)
- Solo: $19/month — all 8 modules, up to 3 active projects, 1 user
- Founder: $49/month — up to 5 team members, up to 3 client portals, LinkedIn Studio, granular permissions
- Agency: $99/month — unlimited team members, unlimited client portals, white-label portal option, priority support
- 14-day free trial on all plans. No credit card required to join waitlist.

## Key modules
1. Real-Time Inbox — Project channels, group chats, DMs. Supabase Realtime WebSocket. @AI mentions trigger inline AI responses.
2. Tasks & Projects — Four time-horizon buckets. Priority auto-sorting. Deliverable requirements on task completion.
3. Vault — Google Drive-backed. Role-scoped folder hierarchy per project. drive.file scope only (never accesses existing Drive content).
4. Client Portal — Scoped workspace per client. Inbox, tasks, calendar, vault access. Pre-created DM on activation. One click to spin up.
5. CRM / Relationships — Leads, investors, partners, talent, advisors. Meeting outcome tracking, follow-up reminders, LinkedIn URL field.
6. Calendar — Day/Week/Month views. Google Meet auto-creation. 5-min toast + 1-min full-screen reminders + 10-min AI pre-meeting brief.
7. LinkedIn Studio — Draft, schedule, publish. Impressions and engagement per post.
8. AI Layer (coming soon) — @AI in inbox, global command bar (Cmd+K), daily morning briefs at 8am, pre-meeting briefs, background automations.

## AI Layer details
- @AI in any room: type @AI for inline AI response with full project context injected automatically
- Global command bar: Cmd/Ctrl+K from anywhere — full workspace access across all projects, tasks, calendar, CRM
- Daily brief: 8am push notification — today's meetings, priority tasks, clients awaiting response, projects needing attention, follow-ups due, quick wins
- Pre-meeting brief: 10 minutes before each event — client profile, last conversation summary, open items, suggested talking points
- Background automations: client silence detection (every 6h), weekly client report (Friday 5pm), project risk monitor (daily)
- Supported AI providers: Groq Llama 3.3 70B (free, default), Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPT-4o, Google Gemini
